a.text: Base annual system burden: ~£66k / year (NAO: £20bn ÷ 300,000 high-harm users)
Family / carer therapy + lost work hours: £1,000–£5,000

g.text: Sources: King’s Fund | GOV.UK | Carol Black Review | NAO | NHS ADHD Taskforce | Faraone et al (2021)
